entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for diseases in India

entities.name: COLLAR ROT
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by Aspergillus niger

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS NIGER
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes collar rot in groundnuts

entities.name: STEM ROT
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by Sclerotium rolfsii

entities.name: SCLEROTIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes stem rot in groundnuts

entities.name: CORTICIUM ROLFSII
entities.description: A synonym for the fungal pathogen Sclerotium rolfsii

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by groundnut bud necrosis virus

entities.name: GROUNDNUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The viral pathogen that causes bud necrosis disease in groundnuts

entities.name: EARLY LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by Cercospora arachidicola

entities.name: CERCOSPORA ARACHIDICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes early leaf spot in groundnuts

entities.name: MYCOSPHAERELLA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: A synonym for the fungal pathogen Cercospora arachidicola

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by Phaeoisariopsis personata

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot in groundnuts

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A disease detected on groundnuts caused by Puccinia arachidis

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes rust in groundnuts
